prompt: Create a vertical anime illustration of exactly 3 elegant young women in a Taisho romantic cafe setting, a refined Japanese-Western fusion interior filled with warm lantern light, dark carved wood, stained-glass windows, lace curtains, antique furniture, framed paintings, and vases of flowers. The three women wear ornate wa-lolita maid cafe outfits combining kimono sleeves, floral-patterned haori, ruffled white aprons, black lace trim, ribbon bows, and frilled maid headdresses. Character 1 is seated on the left, with very long black hair and a deep red floral kimono-style outfit; Character 2 stands behind them in the center, with short lavender bob hair, a purple floral kimono jacket, white ruffled blouse, black gloves, and a gentle smile; Character 3 is seated on the lower right, with very long black hair and a teal-blue floral kimono-style outfit. Compose them closely together like a formal cafe portrait, with graceful poses and delicate hands. Use a highly detailed modern anime style with soft painterly shading, intricate linework, muted jewel tones, cream lace, gold accents, and nostalgic early-20th-century Japanese romantic atmosphere. Add an ornate decorative border around the image with large cream and red peonies, flowing gold vines, teal and burgundy patterned panels, and art-nouveau curves. Keep the faces beautiful and expressive, no blur or censoring, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
